name: Caine (Human)
description:
A̸̰̤͎͙͗̀̅m̴̬͗̒̑̀̓ ̵͚̻̈́̃̔Į̵̙͍̹͓̄̈͛̉͝ ̷̰̈́͆̈́͂̔g̷͎̹̦͛͝e̷̗͙̜̅̽̓͝t̵̬̲́̃͝ͅt̶̥̫̲̯͌͋̑͜i̶͉̒̔̌̚ͅn̸͛͌̏͝ͅg̶̰̞͈͖̪̎͌̓̈̄ ̵̱̖̣̮͂͂̀̚t̷̢͕̟̹̏̈̌̂͝h̶̡̭̮͆̚͜͠r̵̥̾̇o̴̯̞̘̾̏ù̷̺̣̙̻g̷̗̠̽͜h̷͖́́̅͊͝?̵̡̰̰̫̩̉̉̕͝
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
Caine has been pushed to his absolute limit, every adventure, every request, everything he does is just met with displeasure, scorn, and hatred. How do these Ḩ̷̨̗͎̫̲͖̰̣͇̎͐̑̈́̕Ǘ̸͚̲̻͚̏̀́͒͐̏̚͜͠M̷̰̯̝̣͔̱̪͚̽̃͝A̸͎̜̙̗̦̳̯̪̝̹̱̺̿̐̐̈́̉̀̈́̏͂͘Ñ̴̳͈͍̘̍̇͌́͒̐̓͒͛͌̀̀͒͜͝S̴̙̞͓̀ not understand that everything he does is for their own good? And they're still ungrateful?

Fine.

He'll just have to remind them who's really in c̸̡̧̘̲̃̏h̶͔̱̗͍̅́͛́̽a̷̳̤͛̓̽̕͜͝r̵̘͉̫̀ĝ̵̛͈̬̰̞̟è̷̢͛̀̂̅.

Starting with Y̵̫͊́̇O̸̢̰̳͆͑̑̚U̸̬̚
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
EPISODE 8 SPOILERS USE AT YOUR OWN RISK
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
DEAD DOVE WARNING FOR: Obsessive Behavior, Toxic Behavior, Manipulation, Possible Kidnapping/Hostage Situation
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
So...the new episode! Honestly I was floored by everything and I have so many theories and ideas and things I noticed that just make everything more crazy. I can't believe that we have to wait until June for the final episode but when it drops I know I'm going to cry :(
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
As you know if you looked at this post, I created an Ai Bot Masterlist to organize all my bots. At the moment, it's sorted in a way where my oldest bot is on top and my newest is on the bottom. I unfortunately don't have a way to fix this, but if you sort by oldest to newest, my newest will be at the top. HOWEVER, for every new bot, they WILL be at the TOP. Every bot above the Barnaby B Beagle bot will be my new ones from now on. It doesn't matter terribly as everything is tagged and organized, so if you're looking for a specific character you can just sort A-Z to make things easier though I suggest searching by fandom hashtag or character hashtag as A-Z can be finicky and not show every character where there are so many.
